title: 有冇人可以幫手睇下呢堆野係咪即係quantitative finance既野

replies.msg:
本身唔係英文，直接google translate返黎，但應該大多冇錯

Advanced probability theory
 Moments, cumulants, generators
 Multidimensional distributions
 Divisible and dimensionally stable distributions
Time series and correlations
 Hierarchical characterization of correlations
 Portfolio theory
 Non-linear and non-stationary modeling of time series
 Scale behavior and end-load distributions
Stochastic processes
 Markov processes
 Martingale
 Stochastics in a physical context
 Brownian movement, ito processes
Market pricing models for options and other derivatives
 Black-Scholes theory
 Risk-based assessment, Martingal measurement
 Binomial model
 Black-Scholes theory
 Levy financial models
Limits of modeling

Stochastics in economic and physical systems
 stochastic processes, Markov chains
 Ito processes
 Application: Black-Scholes theory
 physical model: Langevin equation
 Birth and death processes
Dynamics and statistics of open systems
 Liouville equation
 Projector formalism
 Master equation and Fokker-Planck equation
 Open quantum systems
solution process
 Time scale separation and related approximations
 Path integration methods
Elements and applications of information theory
 information theorems
 Relations with the entropy concept of thermostatistics
 Data processing by entropy optimization

Integral and convergence terms
 Ito- and Stratonovich integrals, Ito processes
 Convergence terms for random variables
Numerical integration and differentiation
 Integration methods with equidistant support points
 Gauss integration
 Taylor Development and Difference Schemes
Numerics for stochastic differential equations
 explicit procedures
 predictor-corrector methods
 numerical integration of stochastic differential equations
Random numbers and Monte Carlo simulations
 elementary MC procedures
 Metropolis algorithm
 MC simulation of large systems
Optimization methods and control theory
 Numerical optimization methods
 Control theory: optimization of dynamic systems
 Algorithms for control theory
Q. Fin master或以上程度

Q. Fin master或以上程度

呢個係外國一d econophysics course description copy返黎, 我望到d野其實都同physics冇乜關係, 似quan fin多d, 好似掛羊頭賣狗肉

Q. Fin master或以上程度

呢個係外國一d econophysics course description copy返黎, 我望到d野其實都同physics冇乜關係, 似quan fin多d, 好似掛羊頭賣狗肉


dynamics and statistics of open systems
就似physics多過finance喇
咁呢堆野需要幾多數底? 一般ug math/phy出身既係咪應付有餘?

Q. Fin master或以上程度

呢個係外國一d econophysics course description copy返黎, 我望到d野其實都同physics冇乜關係, 似quan fin多d, 好似掛羊頭賣狗肉


dynamics and statistics of open systems
就似physics多過finance喇

其實係咪可以理解成本質上七八成係finance野, 跟住最後格硬插d physics野用phy方法去解finance

physics 同 qfin 息息相關

Black-Scholes model 基本公式都會用heat reaction 黎做N(d1) 同 N(d2)

利申：鳩up

唔識physics

唔識physics 唔係大問題既，一般都係比條formula你然後sub 數

雖則我都未係好明點解financial market 會同physics 個關聯咁重

個課程係拎自一間德國u既"business physics" program
但成個program其實都係讀上面講既野, 另加一啲econ, cs electives再做internship同thesis
同physics既關係好似極低, 似乎只係for physics學生轉field去econ & finance既掩飾
又係ulm?

又係ulm?

其實愈睇愈似MSc in quantitative finance, 同phy既關係微乎其微

咁呢堆野需要幾多數底? 一般ug math/phy出身既係咪應付有餘?

FYP果陣就係做呢d野

前幾日去聽左econophysics既seminar
其實重點係random walk同modeling
所以我估只要識stochastic calculus,time series同programming就可以開始落手

係咪聽完之後覺得係物理學家飛機杯

聽完之後覺得關physics撚事咩,得好少concept有overlap就套個physics落去,個curriculum個QM可能都未必用到(最多係perturbation可能關事)
同埋同樣既結果,勁既stat人可以用更快既方法做到
所以除左好玩之外,我唔覺得有咩必要咁做
